items.title: Marketing campaign kickoff
items.scenario: A marketer asks Claude to generate ten headline variants and a one-page creative brief from a product positioning doc they paste in. The team picks two headlines for A/B testing after brand review.
items.explanation: Creative use case: Claude accelerates divergence; humans choose and test.

items.title: On-call runbook summary
items.scenario: An SRE pastes alert logs and the current runbook section; Claude produces a timeline and suggested next checks. The engineer executes commands and updates the ticket.
items.explanation: Ops use case: synthesis under pressure—execution stays human.

items.title: HR policy FAQ bot (API)
items.scenario: Internal app retrieves HR PDFs, sends relevant chunks with the employee question to Claude via API, and displays the answer with links to source sections.
items.explanation: Enterprise pattern: retrieval + generation beats naked chat for policy accuracy.
